text: For the avoidance of doubt, all companies, partnerships, trusts, joint ventures and other entities related to Owner or in the Greystar family of companies (and the directors, officers, trustees, managers, and borrowed, leased, or actual employees of any of them or of Greystar Management Services, LLC or other employment entity) shall qualify as additional insureds. For the CGL insurance, additional insured status must be provided on ISO forms CG 20 10 and CG 20 37. The Additional Insureds with coverage for actual or alleged bodily injury, property damage and personal and advertising liability arising out of any premises-ongoing operations and/or products-completed operations.
